// GOOD: use enums or builder pattern instead of raw booleans
pub enum Compression {
    None,
    Gzip,
    Zstd,
}

pub enum Encryption {
    None,
    Aes256,
}

pub struct ProcessOptions {
    pub compression: Compression,
    pub encryption: Encryption,
}

pub fn process_data(data: &[u8], options: &ProcessOptions) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut result = data.to_vec();
    match options.compression {
        Compression::None => {}
        Compression::Gzip => result = compress_gzip(&result),
        Compression::Zstd => result = compress_zstd(&result),
    }
    match options.encryption {
        Encryption::None => {}
        Encryption::Aes256 => result = encrypt_aes256(&result),
    }
    result
}

pub enum TlsMode {
    None,
    Verified,
    Unverified,
}

pub fn connect(host: &str, tls: TlsMode) -> Connection {
    match tls {
        TlsMode::None => connect_plain(host),
        TlsMode::Verified => connect_tls_verified(host),
        TlsMode::Unverified => connect_tls_unverified(host),
    }
}
